description_long: This is a rustic, cylindrical wooden mug or bucket with a wide open top and a slightly tapered body. The exterior is constructed from vertically aligned wooden staves, featuring a pronounced wood grain texture in varying shades of brown. Two thick, dark metal bands encircle the body, providing structural reinforcement and a classic barrel-like appearance. The base is broad and faceted, also reinforced with a dark metal ring, giving the object stability. A sturdy, angular handle made of the same dark material is attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping and carrying. The interior is hollow, making it suitable for holding liquids or small items.
description: A wooden mug or bucket with dark metal bands and a sturdy handle, featuring a pronounced wood grain and reinforced base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, wood grain, and two metal bands, with the handle not visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the handle attached to the side and the reinforced base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical metal reinforcement strip and the absence of the handle.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle fully visible and the wood grain pattern prominent.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops and vertical metal strip
